film.title: Day of the Dead
film.overview: As the world is overrun by zombies, scientists and military personnel in an underground Florida bunker must decide on how they should deal with the undead.

dialogues.dialogue: So what you're doin' is a waste of time, Sarah.  And time is all we got left, you know.  What I'm doing... - is all there's left to do. - Shame on you.  - is all there's left to do. - Shame on you.  There's plenty to do. Plenty to do.
